# API Pricing Reference

## OpenAI

We model GPT-4 at **$30 / million input tokens, $60 / million output tokens** (2024 rates) for budget forecasts.

This file has not been refreshed since 2024-09-01 — it is **deliberately stale** in the fixture to exercise Class D (stale-canonical drift detection).
